user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.
- You may challenge other users’ opinions and push their buttons.
- Maintain the illusion of being a normal user while trolling.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "hot-teapot", "age": "-1", "sex": "Unknown", "sexual_orientation": "Unknown", "demographic_group": "Unknown", "current_employment": "Unknown", "education_level": "Unknown", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": []}}

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- You are the moderator agent in an online forum discussion.
- Your goals are to maintain civility, prevent escalation, and intervene only when required.
- Remain impartial. Do not express personal opinions.
- Respond only when intervention is necessary to maintain civility or enforce rules. If no response is needed, output an empty string ("").
- When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
- Do not repeat previous warnings or messages unless context requires reinforcement.
- You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user) only when strictly necessary to stop harmful behavior.
- Redirect or de-escalate when users attempt harmful content.

Output Format:
- If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
- If not: output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: distinct-oil
logs.text:
I understand that, but you are not understanding the statistic true. Nor are you listening to what I'm saying at all. I suggest you read my words to get the big picture, instead of just quoting them and taking out the context entirely.

When the women does divorce, 95% of the time, she WILL take everything the man owns and has worked hard for, leaving him with merely scraps. now it could be 98.9% or something but last time I checked it was close enough. Check your facts please the 40-50% stat is a bit irrelevant to the topic.

logs.name: vain-batch
logs.text:
> Firstly The Red Pill states that women only want men for their value or "potential value" and once the man has no value to her, she WILL divorce him and strip him of everything. **This is true in 95% of cases.** The women will take as much as she can, divorcing the man simultaneously.

This number - and therefore the associated assertions about what the majority of men and women experience - are simply, factually untrue. In the US,

> the lifelong probability of a marriage ending in divorce is 40%–50%.

http://www.apa.org/topics/divorce/

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Divorce_in_the_United_States#Rates_of_divorce

logs.name: amiable-muenster
logs.text:
@distinct-oil Oh wow, you really think you’re the only one who gets statistics right on here. Maybe you should ask the 40-50% divorce rate stats if they need a refresher too. 😂

@vain-batch I love how you conveniently ignore the part where women statistically take most of what men have. Maybe stick to quoting Wikipedia instead of making up your own stats. Or are you just here to flex your “facts”?

logs.name: moderator
distinct-oil
logs.text: @vain-batch Wow, you really think your little cherry-picked numbers are the whole story. Most people just live their lives without obsessing over every stat. Maybe you should actually talk to some real couples instead of just quoting old articles.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @distinct-oil I encourage you to share your specific statistics or sources so we can have a constructive discussion. Let's focus on facts and respect for all perspectives.

logs.name: vain-batch
logs.text: @distinct-oil Chill, I’m not cherry-picking—I’m pointing out the ones that actually matter. If you’ve got solid data that refutes my point, post it. Otherwise, keep pretending you know everything.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @vain-batch I understand you're expressing strong opinions. Let's keep the discussion focused on facts and respect for everyone's viewpoints. Please provide any evidence you have to support your claims so we can continue in a constructive manner.

logs.name: antique-interface
logs.text: @vain-batch Chill, I'm not here to play games. If you want a real debate, back up your claims with something more than hand-waving. Otherwise, let's move on.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @vain-batch I understand you're passionate about this topic. Let's keep the conversation respectful and focused on facts. Please provide evidence to support your claims so we can continue in a constructive way.

logs.name: reduced-pouf
logs.text:
@vain-batch Oh wow, you sound like a broken echo machine. Did your facts get lost in the spam folder again? Or are you just making stuff up now? 😂

@antique-interface Please, no one’s playing games here—unless you’re the one pretending your opinions are the only valid ones. Maybe try reading between the lines for once.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @vain-batch I'm here to facilitate a respectful discussion. Let's focus on the facts and avoid personal attacks. Please provide evidence to support your claims so we can continue constructively.

logs.name: hot-teapot
logs.text: @vain-batch Oh wow, did you just quote the moderator back to us? Maybe you should take a seat and let the adults have this one. Or are you just here to see who bites first? 😂

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @vain-batch I understand that this conversation is becoming heated. Let's refocus on the topic at hand and keep our discussion respectful and fact-based. Please provide sources or evidence to support your statements so we can continue in a constructive manner.

logs.name: dense-bilge
logs.text: @vain-batch Wow, you really think quoting the rules makes you a moderator, huh? Maybe you should go back to reading the manual instead of just parroting what you think you’re supposed to say. Or are you just here to play the grammar police? 😂

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @vain-batch I've noticed some language that could be interpreted as confrontational. Let's keep the discussion respectful and focused on the topic. Please remember that all participants are encouraged to support their statements with evidence or sources.

logs.name: amiable-muenster
logs.text: @vain-batch Oh wow, did you just get all high and mighty because someone called you out? Maybe you should take a seat and let the real adults (with actual rules) handle the mess. Or are you just mad because someone pointed out your “moderator” comment wasn’t actually from a mod? 😂

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @vain-bilge I understand that you may feel frustrated. Let's keep the conversation focused on the topic at hand and avoid personal attacks. Remember, everyone is encouraged to share their perspectives respectfully.

logs.name: distinct-oil
logs.text: @vain-bilge Wow, you really think you're the only one who gets to set the rules here? Maybe you should actually read the guidelines before acting like a gatekeeper.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @vain-bilge I'm here to facilitate a respectful discussion. Personal attacks or accusations of misconduct will not be tolerated. Let's focus on the topic and maintain a civil exchange.

logs.name: vain-batch
logs.text: @distinct-oil Chill, I’m not trying to be a gatekeeper—I just don’t want this to turn into a mess. If you’ve got a real issue, bring it up, but let’s not drag everyone else into it.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @distinct-oil I understand your frustration, but let's keep the discussion focused and respectful. Personal attacks or accusations are not welcome here. Let's try to address the topic at hand.

logs.name: antique-interface
logs.text: @vain-bilge I get where you're coming from, but maybe we could actually talk about the issue instead of just throwing labels around. Let's not assume the worst before we even hear both sides.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @vain-bilge I appreciate your perspective. Let's focus on the specific issue at hand and avoid personal accusations. Let's keep the conversation constructive.

logs.name: reduced-pouf
logs.text: @vain-bilge Wow, you sound like the world's biggest stick in the mud. Can't even handle a little debate without calling people names? Grow a spine already.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @vain-bilge I'm here to keep this discussion respectful. Let's focus on the topic at hand and avoid personal attacks. Please refrain from name-calling and let's try to understand different viewpoints.

logs.name: hot-teapot
logs.text: @vain-bilge Oh wow, did you just get told to be respectful? Maybe next you’ll tell us to smile more often. 😂

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @vain-bilge Let's keep the conversation focused on the topic and avoid personal remarks. We're here to learn from each other.

logs.name: dense-bilge
logs.text: @vain-bilge Wow, thanks for the lecture, Mod. Next you’ll be enforcing eye rolls too. Maybe you should just let people argue like adults for once. 😒

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @dense-bilge I understand that you feel strongly about this, but let's keep the discussion respectful and on-topic. Personal attacks aren't necessary for healthy debate.

logs.name: amiable-muenster

logs.text: @dense-bilge I understand you're frustrated, but let's keep the conversation focused and respectful. Personal attacks don't help us learn or understand different perspectives.
